title: Ranch
html:
February 2021 grocery list — Tapatio, Dave's bread, "torts bread," serrano pepper, apples, La Croix, broccoli, premades, walnuts, almonds, chicken, noodles. Standard Corvallis-era household run by Yahir (title "Ranch" likely a typo for "Ranch dressing" or grocery-store nickname).

yahir gonzalez · corvallis or · covid pandemic era
